data-pipeline.description: A data pipeline is a series of processes that migrate data from a source to a destination data store (often a database).

docker.description: [Docker](https://www.docker.com/) uses operating system level virtualization to isolate software in packages called containers.

drm.description:
[Digital Right Management](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Digital_rights_management) is a way to protect data from being copied.
Posts focus on how to get rid of DRM for the purpose of a private copy of the content.

elasticsearch.description:
[Elasticsearch](https://www.elastic.co/) is a powerful NoSQL document data base that is aimed to analyze text based content.
It is developed under the [open-core business model](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Open-core_model).

linux.description: The linux tag is a container for all posts that focus on a linux based operating system, such as [Ubuntu](https://ubuntu.com/) or [Manjaro](https://manjaro.org/).

machine-learning.description: Machine Learning posts focus on computer algorithms that improve automatically through experience.

next.js.description:
[Next.js](https://nextjs.org/) is a framework that is written in Javascript and uses the [React](https://reactjs.org/) framework to render HTML pages.
It is extremly flexible and can be used to render pages on the client, the server (static pages) and everything in between.

nextcloud.description:
[Nextcloud](https://nextcloud.com) allows users to set up a set of tools to save and share data privately.
It is not tied to the public cloud, so that users can spin up instances on their own private hardware and keep their data privately.

notes.description: Generic tag that I use to tag (short) blog entries, in which I mainly document stuff for myself but expose those notes as they might be of interest for others as well.

pihole.description:
[Pi-hole](https://pi-hole.net/) is a lightweight nextwork-level ad- and tracking blocking application, which allows to block content for all devices in the network.
It acts as a DNS sinkhole and optionally as a DHCP server.

tech.description: Generic tag that I use to tag posts that cover tech topics (which are most of my posts).
